text:
There once was a little girl named Lily. She had the biggest dreams.

Every night before bed, Lily would dream about climbing a mountain so high it touched the stars.

One morning, she woke up feeling a little different. She smiled a little more. She realized she wanted to climb those stars. And maybe, just maybe, she could climb them.

For months, Lily practiced every day. Climbing boxes. Practicing her handstands. Learning how to balance on her hands.

Finally, the day came when she was ready. She scaled the mountain. It was beautiful – stars all twinkle-ing above.

She rested for a moment. Then she started down, careful this time.

When she reached the bottom, she looked up. There were thousands, millions of stars! It was magical.

Lily's dreams finally came true. She had climbed to the stars. And every night since, she'd look up and smile, thinking of the mountain she climbed.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
